::::: {#punctuality-grid .grid .column-page}


::: {.g-col-4}

```{=html}
<!-- <div class="row mt-3"> -->
  <!-- <div class="col-sm-4"> -->
    <div>
      <iframe 
        id="delay-plot-gauge"
        class="resp-iframe"
        style="border: 0; width: 100%; height: 400px;"
        src="https://www.eurocontrol.int/Economics/Oscar/plot-pun-nw-gauge.html"
        sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"
        frameborder="0"
        scrolling="no"
        allowfullscreen>
      </iframe>
    </div>
  <!-- </div> -->
```
:::

::: {.g-col-8}
```{=html}
  <!-- <div class="col-sm-8"> -->
    <div>
      <iframe 
        id="delay-plot-evo"
        class="resp-iframe"
        style="border: 0; width: 100%; height: 400px;"
        src="https://www.eurocontrol.int/Economics/Oscar/plot-pun-nw-evo.html"
        sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"
        frameborder="0"
        scrolling="no"
        allowfullscreen>
      </iframe>
    </div>
  <!-- </div> -->
<!-- </div> -->
```
:::
:::::
